html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

“Essence of insight... Fuel of power... ...Bubbling.”

-

The Nucleation Fluid is an item that can be used to craft the Spark Ark near the Notional Fabricator. It is dropped from the Armored Bearger, Crystal Deerclops and Possessed Varg after the Celestial Scion is defeated in the world.

Trivia

  • Nucleation Fluid was added in the Hostile Takeover: Phase Two update.

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion
“It's bubbling with possibility!”
–Wilson
“Gross.”
–Willow
“Bubble, bubble.”
–Wolfgang
“It seems alive but not.”
–Wendy
“ORGANIC AND INORGANIC MATTER DETECTED”
–WX-78
“The fluids exhibit anomalous properties, no doubt catalyzed by the mutations.”
–Wickerbottom
“What is that stuff?”
–Woodie
“Yucky.”
–Maxwell
“Cursed blöod öf the Jötnar!”
–Wigfrid
“We like bubbles.”
–Webber
“It is stewing and brewing!”
–Warly
“Bubble friend”
–Wormwood
“Looks like radiator fluid from space.”
–Winona
“All that trouble for these bubbles.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh. Weird bubble slime.”
–Wurt
“I don't know what that stuff is, but I love it.”
–Walter
“I know that bubbling gunk has a use.”
–Wanda
“Essence of insight... Fuel of power... ...Bubbling.”
-
The Nucleation Fluid is an item that can be used to craft the Spark Ark near the Notional Fabricator. It is dropped from the Armored Bearger, Crystal Deerclops and Possessed Varg after the Celestial Scion is defeated in the world.

{{Scrapbook Info|Essence of insight... Fuel of power... ...Bubbling.}}
The '''Nucleation Fluid''' is an item that can be used to craft the [[Spark Ark]] near the [[Notional Fabricator]]. It is dropped from the [[Armored Bearger]], [[Crystal Deerclops]] and [[Possessed Varg]] after the [[Celestial Scion]] is defeated in the world.
{{clear}}
== {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Nucleation Fluid
|item2 = Thulecite
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Restrained Static
|tool = Notional Fabricator
|result = Spark Ark Off
}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Nucleation Fluid was added in the ''[[Hostile Takeover: Phase Two]]'' update.
